raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "self-affirmation of personal boundaries and disengagement",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "energetic boundaries exist and can be actively held",
    "incoherence in situations or people is detectable and justifies non-engagement",
    "withdrawal requires no explanation or guilt",
    "a bare 'no' is inherently sufficient and resonant"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent as a set of parallel self-statements reinforcing autonomy and non-obligation",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "speaker is in draining or misaligned interactions where explicit boundary-setting supports psychological well-being without external harm",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "used to evade accountability, avoid necessary dialogue, or frame subjective discomfort as objective incoherence warranting unilateral withdrawal"
}
